assignments.name: faq_text
assignments.value:
SECTION 1: HAPPY WASH (STORE RULES & POLICIES)
====================================================================
About the Shop:
- Name: Happy Wash, a local laundry shop that uses the Washify app to run its business.
- Where we are: Mabalacat City, Pampanga.
- Open Hours: Monday to Saturday, 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM. We are closed on Sundays.

Prices & Machine Limits:
- Price: 220 pesos per load. One load can hold up to 8 kg of clothes.
- Minimum Price: If your clothes weigh less than 8 kg, it still costs 220 pesos. This is because we reserve a full machine just for your items.

Services & Laundry Rules:
- Services: We wash, dry, and fold your clothes. Soap and fabric softener are already included in the price.
- Separating Clothes: Can I mix white and colored clothes in one load? We strongly advise splitting them into separate loads so the colors don't bleed onto each other. Each load is charged separately.
- Delicate Items: Our machines are made for regular everyday clothes. If you have very delicate items or clothes that need dry cleaning, please tell our staff before handing them over so we can check if our machines are safe for them.

When It’s Ready, Payments, & Storage:
- Waiting Time: Standard laundry takes 24 hours to finish. Same-day service is available if you drop off your clothes before 10 AM.
- How to Pay: We accept cash and GCash.
- Picking Up: Please bring the paper claim ticket we give you when you drop off your laundry.
- Leftover Laundry: We will safely store your laundry for up to 30 days. If laundry is not claimed after 30 days, we will have to dispose of it.

====================================================================
SECTION 2: WASHIFY (HOW THE APP & TEXT SYSTEM WORK)
====================================================================
What is Washify?
- The System: Washify is the computer software that our laundry shop uses. It keeps your order records safe, tracks your laundry, and sends automatic text messages.

Tracking Your Order:
- Laundry Stages: How do I know where my laundry is? The app tracks your clothes through four simple steps: Received (Dropped off), Washing, Ready (Done), and Picked up.
- Automatic Text Messages: The second our staff clicks "Ready" on their screen, the system instantly sends a real-time text message straight to your phone to let you know your laundry is done.

Losing Your Ticket & Security:
- Safe Records: Every time you drop off laundry, the app creates a secure record and prints out a receipt ticket with a unique order code on it.
- Lost Claim Tickets: What if a customer loses their paper ticket? Don't worry. Our staff can easily type your name or phone number into the app to find your order code in a few seconds.
- Privacy & Tracking: The app lets us mark orders as "Paid" or "Unpaid" so there is no confusion about money. All of your personal details and laundry history are completely private and locked away so no other shops using the app can see them.
